headline: How court battles have delayed the U.S. eVTOL industry’s commercial flight aspirations
summary: Heated battles are unfolding in the courtroom between Joby, Archer and Vertical, threatening to sidetrack certification aspirations and investor appetite. Shares of major air taxi makers have dropped this year as sentiment sours. eVTOL makers have long pushed back certification timelines, but the Trump administration's pilot program is providing the support to get them across the finish line.

headline: A Look Back at Stock Picks GE Aerospace, Okta, and MSG Sports. Where The Charts Stand Today.
summary: Revisiting former stock picks offers valuable perspective not only on performance, but also on how technical patterns, market conditions, and investor sentiment evolve.  Okta  which Dan Victor reviewed in February.  The stock is up a pedestrian 2% year to date, but over the past year has advanced 35%.

headline: U.S. Scores Major Rare Earth Win With Greenland Deposit Deal
summary: REalloys secures a 15-year offtake deal for heavy rare earths from Greenland's Tanbreez project, adding critical dysprosium and terbium supply ahead of the Pentagon's 2027 China ban.
